official_sources.surface: Gate.io API v4 Spot and Futures endpoints
official_sources.evidence: The current adapter wires Spot and USDT perpetual futures request paths, parsers, private readback, positions and order lifecycle.

official_sources.surface: Gate.io API v4 Delivery Futures and Options endpoint families
official_sources.evidence: Delivery Futures and Options require separate metadata, order book, account/position/risk and private order lifecycle routing from the current /futures/usdt perpetual runtime.

runtime_isolation: Do not route Delivery Futures or Options symbols through the existing Spot or /futures/usdt perpetual paths. Add explicit market-type routing and parser coverage before promotion.

delivery_market_metadata: delivery contract risk and size fields
delivery_private_account: delivery trade fees or contract risk readback

unsafe_to_promote_without: Delivery/Options market-type routing isolated from Spot and USDT perpetual
metadata and order book fixtures for each product line
account, position and risk parser coverage
signed private order lifecycle request specs
remaining_work: add request specs, parser fixtures and guarded runtime tests for each product line
